---
title: Search parsnip models
weight: 2
description: |
  Find model types, engines, and arguments to fit and predict in the tidymodels framework.
toc: true
toc-depth: 0
listing:
  id: parsnip-list
  contents: items.yml
  template: card.ejs.md
  sort: ["title"]
  sort-ui: [title, model, engine, mode, package]
  filter-ui: true
  categories: false
  page-size: 25
r-packages:
  - tidymodels
  - readr
  - yaml
include-after-body: ../../html/resources.html
format:
  html:
    css: cards.css
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <script src="filters.js" defer></script>
---

To learn about the parsnip package, see [*Get Started: Build a Model*](/start/models/). Use the filters below to find [model types and engines](#models).

```{r}
#| label: build-items
#| include: false
library(readr)
library(yaml)

x <- read_csv("parsnip_models.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
x[is.na(x)] <- ""
items <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(x)), function(i) {
  list(
    title = x$title[i],
    model = x$model[i],
    engine = x$engine[i],
    mode = as.character(x$mode[i]),
    package = x$package[i],
    url = x$url[i]
  )
})
write_yaml(items, "items.yml")
```

::: {#parsnip-list}
:::
